ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text:
Jelly 52% (glucose-fructose syrup, sugar, water, humectant: glycerol; concentrated cherry 
juice (2.9% in jelly), gelling agent: pectins; acidity regulators: citric acid, sodium citrates; concentrate from 
black carrot ,flavourings, colour: carotenes); sponge cake 33% (wheat flour, pasteurized egg mass, sugar, 
wheat starch, glucose syrup, humectant: glycerol; emulsifiers: E 471, E 475; rapeseed oil, raising agent: 
ammonium carbonates; salt, flavouring, colour: carotenes); chocolate 15% (sugar, cocoa mass, cocoa 
butter, emulsifiers: lecithins (from soy), E 476; flavouring). 
Product may contain milk, peanuts, nuts and sesame seeds.
